zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Saward於1575年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，他的父親Thomas Saward24歲，母親Rachell Saward21歲。他於1604年10月22日與Winifred Nightingale在英國艾可格亞特 坎菲爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Saward于1575年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，他的父亲Thomas Saward24岁，母亲Rachell Saward21岁。他于1604年10月22日与Winifred Nightingale在英国艾可格亞特 坎菲爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Saward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Saward was born in 1575, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Saward, was 24 and his mother, Rachell Saward, was 21. He married Winifred Nightingale on 22 October 1604, in Great Canfield, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Saward est né en 1575, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Saward, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Rachell Saward, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Winifred Nightingale le 22 octobre 1604, à Great Canfield, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Saward 1575 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Saward 24 und seine Mutter Rachell Saward 21. Er hat am 22. Oktober 1604 in Great Canfield, Essex, England Winifred Nightingale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Saward è nato il nel 1575 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Saward, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Rachell Saward, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Winifred Nightingale il 22 ottobre 1604, nel Great Canfield, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Chelmsford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sawardが1575年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Sawardは24歳，母Rachell Sawardは21歳であった。1604年10月22日にイギリスエセックスグレアト カンフィールドでWinifred Nightingaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward(이)가 1575년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Saward(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Rachell Saward(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1604년 10월 22일 영국 에세스 그리트 캔필드에서 Winifred Nightingale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 헬스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Saward nasceu em 1575, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Saward, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Rachell Saward, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Winifred Nightingale em 22 de outubro de 1604, em Great Canfield, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Saward родился в 1575 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Saward было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Rachell Saward, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Winifred Nightingale 22 октября 1604 г. в местности грит канфиелд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
